root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_group_name , sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date , '!operate_date_1!'as from_date , '!operate_date_2!'as to_date , sc_mem_m_chang_request.salary_amount , to_snumber(decode(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last,'1','0',sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old)) as shr_value_old , to_snumber(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new) as shr_value_new , to_snumber(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - decode(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last,'1','0',sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old))as add_share_amount , (select pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sum(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - decode(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last,'1','0',sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old)))) from sc_mem_m_chg_share_det , sc_mem_m_chang_request where sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no and sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code = 'LON' /*WHERE*/ ) as sum_add_share_amount from sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.cancel_status = '0' and sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code = 'LON' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
